offer: Never Miss a Call — AI Receptionist for local service businesses
authority: Founder (Market Package Validator) directive 'SAVE AND LOCK' 2026-07-09

decision.rationale: Only supplier clearing all 3 hard gates: full white-label + resell-under-our-brand, Canada AND US numbers, turnkey ~5min/client. Framed as a validation pilot due to contractual/economic risk (MAP floor, revocable license, no-refund ToS, $0.25/min overage, wholesale sales-gated).
backups: OnCallClerk / Trillet only after confirming Canadian numbers in writing
eliminated: ai-receptionist.com (no reseller program — cannot resell under our brand)

evidence_basis.verification_note: Trillet's adversarial verifier returned a placeholder ('Test summary.') — Trillet's claims are research-only, NOT adversarially verified; flagged in SUPPLIER_EVIDENCE_v1.json.
evidence_basis.caveat: Vendor pricing/reseller terms change and are partly sales-gated; wholesale/MAP/overage for MAFD are UNKNOWN until the reseller application returns a rate card.

open_next_action: Send RESELLER_RATE_CARD_REQUEST_v1 to My AI Front Desk/Frontdesk; obtain wholesale + MAP + overage + termination terms in writing before pricing publicly or building a branded client book.
